conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
So you're new here? What brought you in today?
Yeah, never been before. Honestly, I just needed someone to talk to about some stuff that's been bugging me.
That can be really helpful. Can you tell me a little bit about what's on your mind lately?
Well, I've just been feeling really guilty about not being able to do my job as well as I used to. I'm a freelance writer and I've had some tough deadlines recently.
That sounds like it could be stressful. Have you been getting enough sleep?
Sleep's been okay, I guess. Not great, but I haven't been sleeping poorly or anything. It's more just feeling restless at night.
Okay, that makes sense. What about your energy levels? Are you feeling tired during the day?
Yeah, sometimes. Like, if I don't get a nap in, I can be pretty sluggish by mid-afternoon.
Okay. And what about appetite and eating habits? Have you noticed any changes there?
Honestly, I've just been eating whatever's convenient, you know? Not really thinking about it too much.
That sounds like it could be a pattern. What about your social life and relationships? Are you feeling connected to the people around you?
Yeah, definitely not as much as I used to. My friends have all been busy with their own stuff.
Okay. Have you noticed any changes in your mood lately? Do you feel like you're more irritable or anxious than usual?
Yeah, a little bit, yeah. Like, if things don't go my way, I can get really upset.
That sounds tough. What about hobbies and enjoyment? Are there any activities that bring you joy right now?
Um, honestly? Not really. I used to love reading, but lately, it just feels like too much effort.
Okay. And what about your work or study situation? Can you tell me a bit more about what's going on there?
Well, my clients are starting to get antsy because I'm not meeting deadlines and stuff. It's really stressing me out.
Okay. That sounds like it could be overwhelming. Have you been concentrating well lately? Are you having trouble focusing?
Yeah, definitely. Like, if someone starts talking to me while I'm trying to work, I just zone out completely.
Okay. What about recent stressful life events? Is there anything that's been weighing on your mind?
Honestly? My grandma passed away a few months ago and it's really hit me hard. I keep replaying all these "what ifs" in my head.
I'm so sorry to hear that. Losing someone we love can be incredibly difficult. What kind of support system do you have around you right now?
Um, my friends are trying to help, but it's just not the same as having my grandma around.
Okay. Well, what are some goals or things you'd like to work on in our sessions together? What would make a big difference for you?
I guess just being able to get my job back on track and feeling more hopeful about the future. Maybe even finding some time to read again.
That sounds like a great place to start. Okay, let's explore some strategies for making that happen. What do you think would help you most?
Honestly? Just having someone listen without judgment and giving me permission to not be okay would be huge.
I'm here for that. We can work together to create a safe space for you to express yourself.
Yeah, that sounds amazing, thank you.
Of course. Let's make some progress on those goals we discussed. What do you think is the first step you could take this week?
Um, I guess just making a list of things I need to get done and prioritizing them would be good.
That's a great start! Can you commit to doing that by the end of the week?
Yeah, yeah, I can do that.
